title: At Trade Fair Exhibition
description: Senior Manager, Investor Education Division, Market Development Department, Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Musa Sule Dakup with  Minister of FCT Mallam Muhammed Musa Bello during the Exhibition
html: Senior Manager, Investor Education Division, Market Development Department, Securities and Exchange Commission Mr Musa Sule Dakup with  Minister of FCT Mallam Muhammed Musa Bello during the Exhibition Inspection at the ongoing 17th Abuja International Trade Fair.
